mapper.sql: resume_id AS "resumeId", user_id AS "userId", original_name AS "originalName", storage_path AS "storagePath", size_bytes AS "sizeBytes", suffix, uploaded_at AS "uploadedAt", parse_status AS "parseStatus", parse_error AS "parseError", parsed_json AS "parsedJson"
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO resume_record( resume_id, user_id, original_name, storage_path, size_bytes, suffix, uploaded_at, parse_status, parse_error, parsed_json ) VALUES ( #{record.resumeId}, #{record.userId}, #{record.originalName}, #{record.storagePath}, #{record.sizeBytes}, #{record.suffix}, #{record.uploadedAt}, #{record.parseStatus}, #{record.parseError}, #{record.parsedJson} )
mapper.update: UPDATE resume_record SET user_id = #{record.userId}, original_name = #{record.originalName}, storage_path = #{record.storagePath}, size_bytes = #{record.sizeBytes}, suffix = #{record.suffix}, uploaded_at = #{record.uploadedAt}, parse_status = #{record.parseStatus}, parse_error = #{record.parseError}, parsed_json = #{record.parsedJson} WHERE resume_id = #{record.resumeId}
